displayDescription.zh: 福岛邦彦提出 Neocognitron，这是一种用于抗平移视觉模式识别的层级自组织神经网络。它交替使用特征层和容忍层，预示了后来卷积神经网络中的核心思想。
displayDescription.en: Kunihiko Fukushima proposed the neocognitron as a hierarchical self-organizing neural network for shift-tolerant visual pattern recognition. Its alternating feature and tolerance layers anticipated ideas that later became central to convolutional neural networks.

description.en: Primary paper record for the neocognitron.

license.en: Reference link only; local explainers are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地解释图为原创重绘。

html.zh: 福岛邦彦提出 Neocognitron，这是一种用于抗平移视觉模式识别的层级自组织神经网络。它交替使用特征层和容忍层，预示了后来卷积神经网络中的核心思想。
html.en: Kunihiko Fukushima proposed the neocognitron as a hierarchical self-organizing neural network for shift-tolerant visual pattern recognition. Its alternating feature and tolerance layers anticipated ideas that later became central to convolutional neural networks.

html.zh: 特征检测层和容忍层把平移后的图案转化为稳定的类别证据。 互动演示会突出这些步骤如何把资料线索与可见的系统行为连接起来。
html.en: Feature-detecting layers and tolerance layers turn shifted patterns into stable category evidence. The interactive demo focuses on the steps that connect the source material to the visible system behavior.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Neocognitron 视为卷积视觉网络的重要先祖，尽管现代 CNN 使用不同训练流程。它的长期影响在于用于抗平移识别的层级特征与池化模式。
html.en: Experts generally treat the neocognitron as a major ancestor of convolutional vision networks, even though modern CNNs use different training procedures. Its long-term legacy is the hierarchical feature-and-pooling pattern for shift-tolerant recognition.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.
